case_title: RUI BAI KUANG VS. ARVINA DE LA CRUZ

docket_entries.description: STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM COMMISSIONER (2 PAGES) FILED BY KUANG, RUI BAI DE LA CRUZ, ARVINA DE LA CRUZ, ANDRES DE LA CRUZ, REBECCA
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM PENELOPE PAHL FILED BY KUANG, RUI BAI DE LA CRUZ, REBECCA
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-22-2009 - JUDGMENT. (CLERK-BETH WILBER, 506)
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED APR-01-2009 ORDERED DESTROYED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,800.00 FILED BY KUANG, RUI BAI AS TO DEFENDANT DE LA CRUZ, ARVINA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-22-2009 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
COPYING FEES PAID BY PLAINTIFF KUANG, RUI BAI
AMENDED MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,800.00 FILED BY KUANG, RUI BAI AS TO DEFENDANT DE LA CRUZ, ARVINA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-22-2009 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED SERVED NOV-25-2008, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT DE LA CRUZ, REBECCA

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-22-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-22-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: PENELOPE PAHL. PLAINITFF PRESENT.CO- DEFENDANT REBECCA DE LA CRUZ PRESENT.CO-DEFENDANT STATES THAT SHE DOES NOT KNOW DEFENDANT ARVINA DE LA CRUZ. CO- DEFENDANT REBECCA DE LA CRUZ STATES THAT CO-DEFENDANT ANDRES DE LA CRUZ (HUSBAND) IS DECEASED. PHIL SIN INTERPRETS ENGLISH/CANTONESE - CANTONESE/ENGLISH ON PLAINTIFF'S BEHALF. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KUANG, RUI BAI IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT DE LA CRUZ, ARVINA DE LA CRUZ, ANDRES DE LA CRUZ, REBECCA (PLAINTIFF FAILED TO PROVE DEFENDANT'S RESPONSIBILITY FOR THE DAMAGE TO THE FENCE.) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
